resource.name: zerocount
resource.object: You must select one or more record

resource.name: convertfloat

resource.name: orderOpsMustHaveOneRecord
resource.object: You must select exactly one record for order operations

resource.name: orderlineOpsMustHaveOneRecord
resource.object: You must select exactly one order line record for order line operations

resource.name: OpenPreviewFormError
resource.object: Unable to open label preview form.

resource.name: OpenPreviewFormError
resource.object: Unable to open label preview form.

resource.name: validFromCanNotBeNull
resource.object: Column 'Valid from' does not allow nulls.\n

resource.name: validToCanNotBeNull

resource.name: qaMark1CanNotBeNull
resource.object: Column 'Qa Mark 1' does not allow nulls.\n

resource.object: Column 'Slaughter day' does not allow nulls.\n

resource.name: sldayInFuture
resource.object: Column 'Slaughter day' is entered in the future.\n

resource.object: An error occurred while preparing label.

resource.name: ExportLabelError
resource.object: An error occured while exporting label.

resource.name: NoPrintEngineAvailable
resource.object: No print engine installed on the computer for this type of label.

resource.name: NoPreviewImage
resource.object: No image data returned from preview.

resource.name: e2
resource.object: Exception creating unit operation parameters from XML

resource.name: embeddedAlwaysCreated
resource.object: Embedded operation can not be removed. \nA default operation is always created.

resource.object: You must select on or more record

resource.name: invalidData
resource.object: Invalid data in grid. Printing was stopped.

resource.name: ChangeDataStatusError
resource.object: Unable to change data status for process period.

resource.name: toomanyrecs
resource.object: Operation can only be executed on one record at a time

resource.object: Do you want to close the order ?

resource.name: OrderWasNotPutOnHold
resource.object: Could not put order on hold

resource.name: doHoldOrder

resource.object: There are still {0} order/s active. Some of them might be Fixed orders and can not be stopped.

resource.name: nopropfound
resource.object: {0} is not the name of a property

resource.object: GUI configuration does not include a process unit ID

resource.name: UserNameNotUnique

resource.name: errorDoingItemEntering
resource.object: Error handling corrected item entering inventory during fix. Reason: {0}

resource.name: errorDoingItemLeaving
resource.object: Error handling corrected item leaving inventory during fix. Reason: {0}

resource.name: errorDoingPackEntering
resource.object: Error handling corrected pack entering inventory during fix. Reason: {0}

resource.name: errorDoingPackLeaving
resource.object: Error handling corrected pack leaving inventory during fix. Reason: {0}

resource.name: errorDoingUpdateNotOkPacks
resource.object: Error handling update NotOk pack during fix. Reason: {0}

resource.name: htoolStartAllLocations
resource.object: Start all locations for selected inventory

resource.name: doStartAllLocations
resource.object: Do you want to start new stocktake on all locations for inventory {0}?

resource.name: allLocationsPendingError
resource.object: All locations on inventory {0} have pending stocktakes.

resource.name: numberOfLocStarted
resource.object: Starting stocktake for {0} locations in progress.

resource.name: notAllClosed
resource.object: The following location stocktakes have not been fixed: {0}. \nThe must be fixed individually, before they are closed.

resource.name: packsnotloadedQuit
resource.object: Units have not been loaded. If you quit now no corrective actions will be done.\n\nDo you want to quit?

resource.name: notallfinished
resource.object: Operation has not been done on all units. If you quit now corrective actions will not be performed on all packs.\n\nDo you want to quit?

resource.name: loadingRecords
resource.object: Loading records. This can take several moments

resource.name: queryPalletNull
resource.object: Pallet loaded without any result. Aborting operation.

resource.name: queryNull
resource.object: Packs loaded without any result. Aborting operation.

resource.name: thismanypaleltsloaded
resource.object: Loaded {0} pallets for operation. Job is starting

resource.name: thismanypacksloaded
resource.object: Loaded {0} packs for operation. Job is starting

resource.name: AllHandledText
resource.object: Operation has been done on all units

resource.name: PleaseSweep
resource.object: Please sweep card and select station to login or logout of the station.

resource.name: PleaseScan
resource.object: Please scan barcode and select station to login or logout of the station.

resource.name: PleaseEnterCode
resource.object: Please enter employee code to log into station.

resource.name: NoMatchingAiField
resource.object: Application identifier for employee not found in barcode

resource.name: NoEmpFoundFromBarcode
resource.object: No active employee found from barcode

resource.name: LogoutAllFromAllStationsMessageText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to logout all employees from all stations?

resource.name: OpenImportLabelFormError
resource.object: Unable to open label import form.

resource.name: EditLabelError
resource.object: Unable to open editor for label.

resource.name: barcodeNoLocationCodeFound
resource.object: No Location code found in scanned barcod

resource.name: barcodeNoSsccFound
resource.object: No SSCC found in scanned barcode

resource.name: productCodeNotFound
resource.object: Could not determine product code from scanned barcode

resource.name: locationNotFound
resource.object: No location with the selected location code found

resource.name: firstSelectProduct
resource.object: First enter or scan a product code

resource.name: productNotFound
resource.object: No product with the selected product code exists

resource.name: failedToInitMultiLot
resource.object: Failed to create control for process unit {0}. Message:{1}.

resource.name: pruClientNotCreated
resource.object: Process unit client could not be created

resource.name: dateIsTooOld
resource.object: Date {0} is not allowed. Minimum allowed date is {1}

resource.name: dateIsTooYoung
resource.object: Date {0} is not allowed. Maximum allowed date is {1}.

resource.name: linkedLotsNotUpdates
resource.object: Failed to update linked lots. Message:{0}

resource.name: CancelMessage
resource.object: Do you really want to close the wizard without saving your data?

resource.name: completionLabel.Text
resource.object: All the information needed to create a new composite activity has been gathered. Press the Finish button on the bottom of the dialog to cerate the new composite activity.

resource.object: Do you want to remove order from assigned orders?

resource.object: Do you want to delete this row?

resource.object: Test data with this name already exists. Please try again.

resource.name: SaveNewRecord
resource.object: The new record has not been saved. Please confirm the record before proceeding.

resource.name: SaveChangesRecord
resource.object: The record has not been saved. Please confirm the record before proceeding.

resource.name: PleaseWait
resource.object: Fetching data from service. Please wait a moment before selecting a new row

resource.name: ErrorFetchingOperation
resource.object: Error occurred while fetching operation from service.

resource.object: Do you want to cancel all changes?

resource.object: Error updating the server with changes

resource.name: CliboardNoXml
resource.object: Clipboard does not contain valid xml

resource.name: TestDataNameRequired
resource.object: Name for test data is required!

resource.name: CancelAllChanges
resource.object: Do you want to cancel all changes?

resource.name: OverrideCurOp
resource.object: Do you want to override current operation with contents from the clipboard?

resource.object: Error inserting new matching lot record.

resource.name: onlyOneRow
resource.object: You must select exactly one record

resource.name: errorFetchingPrunitState

resource.object: Can't edit the auto filter row.

resource.name: PromptEnterNumberOfLinesToSplitInto
resource.object: Enter number of lines to split into

resource.name: failCreatePlanText
resource.object: Failed to create a new production plan.\n{0}

resource.name: noShiftHoursText
resource.object: The selected production area has no production hours defined.\n Please fill in the correct shift hours.

resource.name: OptimizationSatisfactory
resource.object: Optimization process found a plan schedule that satisfies constraints.

resource.name: ConstraintsNotSatisfied
resource.object: Plan schedule does not satisfy constraints.\n - Ok: save plan anyway.\n - Cancel: run schedule optimizer and try again.

resource.name: OptimizationError
resource.object: Optimization process failed with an error.

resource.object: Show lines with no dispatch time

resource.object: No alarm event found at/before OEE event time

resource.object: Given datetime may not be in the future

resource.object: Select new status for selected event

resource.name: SelectStopReasonForSelectedEvent
resource.object: Select stop reason for selected event

resource.name: SelectStopReasonForNewEvent

resource.name: ModifyingTheEventWillChangeToManualModeDoYouWishToContinue
resource.object: Modyfying the event will change to manual mode, Do you wish to continue ?

resource.name: WhichActionDoYouWantToPerformOnCurrentEvent
resource.object: Press "End event" to end the current event with a specific stop reason / status. A new event will be created with the actual status of the entity.

resource.name: EndEventWillInsertANewEventBeforeTheCurrentEvent
resource.object: Press "Modify/view" to modify or view the event.

resource.name: ModifyingTheEventWillChangeToManualMode
resource.object: Modifying the event will change to manual mode

resource.name: AddingTheEventWillChangeToManualMode
resource.object: Adding the event will change to manual mode

resource.name: AllDeviceChangesWillBeIgnoredByOEEsystemUntilManualModeIsStopped
resource.object: all device changes will be ignored by OEE system until manual mode is stopped

resource.name: AStatusMustBeSelectedToCreateAnEvent
resource.object: A status must be selected to create an event

resource.name: AStopReasonMustBeSelectedToCreateAnEvent
resource.object: A stop reason must be selected to create an event !

resource.name: labelRemark.Text
resource.object: Warning: Changing events with status 'Running' removes production data from OEE results

resource.name: gridColumnPerformaceDetailOldReason.ToolTip
resource.object: The automatic registered reason that should be replaced.

resource.name: ReasonDisappears
resource.object: The edited reason is outside the visible timerange and will disappear from the view.

resource.name: EventEndEarlierThenStart
resource.object: The end time is earlier then the start time of the loss reason.

resource.name: StartTimeNotInFuture
resource.object: Start time may not be set in the future.

resource.name: EndTimeNotInFuture
resource.object: End time may not be set in the future.

resource.name: NoLossReasonValue
resource.object: The loss reason must have a value.

resource.name: EndTimeNotEmpty
resource.object: The end time may not be empty.

resource.name: StartTimeNotEmpty
resource.object: The start time may not be empty.

resource.name: gridColumnQualityDetailOldReason.ToolTip
resource.object: The automatic registered reason that should be replaced. Leave empty in case the not yet registered losses should get the new reason assigned.

resource.name: ReasonDisappears
resource.object: The edited reason is outside the visible timerange and will disappear from the view.

resource.object: The end time is earlier then the start time of the loss reason.

resource.object: End time may not be set in the future.

resource.object: The loss reason must have a value.

resource.name: EndTimeNotEmpty
resource.object: The end time may not be empty.

resource.name: StartTimeNotEmpty
resource.object: The start time may not be empty.

resource.name: ErrorStandardMapRetrieval
resource.object: Error while retrieving the standard signal map of the entity.

resource.name: InfoStandardMapNotAvailable
resource.object: Standard signal map of the entity can not be shown. Entity controller did not provide a standard map.

resource.name: MultipleAlarms
resource.object: Multiple alarms occurred, expand for details

resource.name: EmptyChart
resource.object: No production losses found for the selected period

resource.name: RestartSysProgram
resource.object: Entity is in initial state. Please restart the OEE manager\nsystem program to initialize the entity.

resource.name: InfoStandardMapCannontBeRestored
resource.object: Standard signal map of the entity could not be restored because it is not available. Entity controller did not provide the standard map.

resource.name: DirectParent
resource.object: Item's parent is the item itself

resource.name: confirmBatchCancel
resource.object: Are you sure you want to cancel this batch?

resource.name: ErrorBatchInProgress
resource.object:
A batch is already in progress on production line.
It needs to be completed before starting this one.

resource.name: ErrorStartBatchInProgressExtraProductionText
resource.object: Go to the production tab to complete the batch

resource.name: BatchStartFailedError
resource.object: Error: Batch failed to start on production line.

resource.name: DisconnectError
resource.object: Error: No connection to server. Trying to reconnect...

resource.name: GetBatchFailed
resource.object: Unable to get batch. Please contact a system administrator.

resource.name: StartStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to start step. Please contact a system administrator.

resource.name: GetStepsFailed
resource.object: Unable to get steps. Please contact a system administrator.

resource.name: DisconnectError
resource.object: Error: No connection to server. Trying to reconnect...

resource.name: OpenStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to open step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: InvalidPrunitCountText
resource.object: Unable to open step. Please choose one of the following process units:{0}

resource.name: ConfirmCompleteStep
resource.object: Are you sure you want to complete the step?

resource.name: NoRecordedAmount
resource.object: No amount has been recorded. Do you want to complete the step?

resource.name: RecordingError
resource.object: Unable to record. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: TestBatchRecord
resource.object: Not possible to record into a test batch.

resource.name: AltProductScanned
resource.object: You are using alternative product: {0} ({1}) {2}You need {3} {4} of {0} for the remaining {5} {4} of {6}

resource.name: Error.BatchStartFailed
resource.object: Batch failed to start on production line.

resource.name: ErrorStartBatchInProgress
resource.object:
A batch is already in progress on production line.
It needs to be completed before starting this one.

resource.name: Error.SizeUnderMinAmount
resource.object: Batch size is under recipe minimum amount ({0} {1})

resource.name: Error.SizeOverMaxAmount

resource.name: adjustWithFirstLabel.Text
resource.object: Batch size depends on input amount.

resource.object: Regenerate the OEE profile for all production days in the selected time range.

resource.object: You must select exactly one record

resource.object: All process units must have same activity type.

resource.name: ValidateMessage.ActivityTemplate
resource.object: All process units must have same activity template.

resource.name: LabelContainer.Hint
resource.object: A label container with support for open an report

resource.name: splitMax
resource.object: Max amount is smaller than current amount.

resource.name: splitLower
resource.object: Total amount is lower than the amount of the un-split order line.

resource.name: splitHigher
resource.object: Total amount is higher than the amount of the un-split order line.

resource.name: textDoApplySingle
resource.object: Do you want to assign new value for the selected order?

resource.name: textDoApplyPlural
resource.object: Do you want to assign new values for all {0} selected orders?

resource.name: NoLineToReValue
resource.object: No lines to re-evaluate for PO-{0}

resource.name: NoMatSelect
resource.object: Product {0} was not selected. Error in update

resource.name: NoLineToReValueOrder
resource.object: No lines to re-evaluate for order-{0}

resource.name: NoProcessUnitDetailed
resource.object: No process unit client has been set

resource.name: NoPurchaseOrdersDetailed
resource.object: No purchase orders are available for the process unit

resource.name: RepExpManNotRunning
resource.object: Could not establish a connection to repexpman.exe. Please make sure that the program is running in order for reports to be exported.

resource.name: XmlMissingBody
resource.object: Xml data missing for report. Please correct this in order for the report to export.

resource.name: NotExportableReport
resource.object: This report does not support automated exports.

resource.name: NotExportableGuiItem
resource.object: This gui item is not exportable.

resource.name: ShowHideAdminTabCaption
resource.object: Show or hide administrator detail tabs

resource.name: ShowHideAdminTabDescription
resource.object: Show or hide administrator detail tabs

resource.name: NoEmailAddress
resource.object: This employee does not have any e-mail address registered.

resource.name: CreateFolderText
resource.object: The folder doesn't exist would you like to try to create it?\nIf the folder is set on a network drive there could be a problem with the network connection if it isn't created.

resource.name: TextTooManyRowsSelected
resource.object: You must select a single row

resource.name: ReprintOrder
resource.object: Do you want to re-print pre-printed order line labels?

resource.name: NoOrderLineUnitOp
resource.object: No operation defined to print label

resource.name: NoLineToPrint
resource.object: No lines to pre-print for order {0}

resource.name: NoOrderLineMaxAmount
resource.object: Order line {0} has no max amount specified. Error in update.

resource.name: OrderNameOne
resource.object: Printing label number {0} for order {1} and order line {2}

resource.name: CanNotGetUnitOperationService
resource.object: Can not connect to unit operation service.

resource.name: CanNotRunOperation
resource.object: Can not run operation. No orders selected or no operation to run.

resource.name: Error.Requirements
resource.object: Requirements must all be of same type for step type Activity

resource.name: Performance.Hint
resource.object: View the OEE performance for the entity

resource.name: Quality.Hint
resource.object: View the OEE quality for the entity

resource.name: OeeDefaultLayout.Hint
resource.object: See DefaultLayout view on this device

resource.name: Availability.Hint
resource.object: View the OEE Availability for the entity

resource.name: OeeValueView.Hint
resource.object: View the OEE value for the entity

resource.name: OeeView.Hint
resource.object: View all the oee figures as a horizontal linear gauges.

resource.name: OeeStatusView.Hint
resource.object: See the current OEE status for the entity

resource.name: OeeShiftView.Hint
resource.object: See the current OEE shift for the entity

resource.name: Running.Hint
resource.object: View the total running time for the entity

resource.name: Idle.Hint
resource.object: View the total idle time for the entity

resource.name: Failure.Hint
resource.object: View the total failure time for the entity

resource.name: StopReasonHistoryView.Hint
resource.object: View a histogram of the stop reasons for the entity

resource.name: PerformanceLossReasonHistoryView.Hint
resource.object: View a histogram of the performance losses for the entity

resource.name: QualityLossReasonHistoryView.Hint
resource.object: View a histogram of the quality losses for the entity

resource.name: LossReasonHistoryView.Hint
resource.object: View a histogram of the all production losses for the entity

resource.name: OEE.Hint
resource.object: View the oee for the entity

resource.name: OeeStopReasonsView.Hint
resource.object: Overview of the current stop reasons

resource.name: LineRestraint.Hint
resource.object: View the total line restraint time for the entity

resource.name: Unscheduled.Hint
resource.object: View the total unscheduled time for the entity

resource.name: OeeLatestEvents.Hint
resource.object: View the latest events for the selected entity. Optionally show only events that require input

resource.name: OeeAvailabilityView.Hint
resource.object: View the availability of current production day for the selected entity.

resource.name: OverrideExists
resource.object: An day profile override already exists for the chosen production day and section.

resource.name: NoContentSpecs
resource.object: No data to load: Configuration values UsePrivateItemContentSpecs and UsePrivatePackContentSpecs are both set to false.

resource.name: CannotChangeProduct
resource.object: Can't change product when items/packs have been assigned to the orderline.

resource.name: TooHighValue
resource.object: Count can not exceed the maximum value of {0}

resource.name: errorInsertingDuplicate
resource.object: Error inserting new matching lot record.\nThe PO code might already exist in Lots.

resource.name: errorInserting
resource.object: Error inserting new matching lot record.

resource.name: colNotVisible
resource.object: Column {0} does not exist in this grid.

resource.name: colNotFound
resource.object: Column {0} does was not found in visible columns.

resource.name: packagingDoesNotAllowCountChange
resource.object: You can not change count for this packaging

resource.name: packCountMustBeSame
resource.object: Pack packaging must be of same amount as previous packaging

resource.name: packagingDoesNotAllowWeightChange
resource.object: You can not change weight for this packaging

resource.name: ChosenPackagingIsNotAllowed
resource.object: Order line does not allow this packaging.

resource.name: CombinedPackagingDoesNotAllowChange
resource.object: Combined packaging does not allow change.

resource.name: SelectError.Title
resource.object: Please select group to import user to from Active Directory.

resource.name: Select.Title
resource.object: Selected row does not have Active Directory group defined.

resource.name: ReadingAD
resource.object: Please wait while reading data from Active Directory.

resource.name: NoManualUpdateMessage
resource.object: Supplies cannot be added manually to this process unit

resource.name: AmountUmMismatch
resource.object: Amount unit for pack and supply method do not match

resource.name: AmountUmIsNull
resource.object: Configuration error: Supply method amount unit can not be null when tracking amount

resource.name: ConfigChangedErrorMessage
resource.object: Configuration has changed. Restart to load new configuration.

resource.name: NoCurrentLot
resource.object: Cannot add supplies. There is no active lot on this process unit.

resource.name: CouldNotFindPack
resource.object: Could not find pack using barcode

resource.name: CouldNotFindLot
resource.object: Could not find lot using barcode

resource.name: CouldNotFindMaterial
resource.object: Could not find product using barcode

resource.name: LotErrorMessage
resource.object: Could not get available lots. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: NoLoad
resource.object: Could not load process unit supply list manager

resource.name: NoManualUpdateMessage
resource.object: Supplies cannot be added manually to this process unit

resource.name: LotErrorMessage
resource.object: Could not get available lots. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CouldNotFindLot
resource.object: Could not find lot using barcode.

resource.name: NoCurrentLot
resource.object: Cannot add supplies. There is no active lot on this process unit.

resource.name: AmountUmMismatch
resource.object: Amount unit for pack and supply method do not match

resource.name: MaterialErrorMessage
resource.object: Could not get available products. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CouldNotFindPack
resource.object: Could not find pack using barcode

resource.name: CouldNotFindMaterial
resource.object: Could not find product using barcode

resource.name: AmountZero
resource.object: Amount must be greater than zero.

resource.name: ConfigChangedErrorMessage
resource.object: Configuration has changed. Restart to load new configuration.

resource.name: AmountUmIsNull
resource.object: Configuration error: Supply method amount unit can not be null when tracking amount

resource.name: InspectionResultReportError
resource.object: Could not open inspection result report. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: lblAdjustWithInput.Text
resource.object: Batch size depends on input amount.

resource.name: Error
resource.object: Could not get data, please contact system administrator.

resource.name: BatchSizeOverLimit
resource.object: Batch size is over recipe maximum amount. ({0}{1})

resource.name: BatchSizeUnderLimit
resource.object: Batch size is under recipe minimum amount. ({0}{1})

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: SetActivityFailed
resource.object: Unable to set activity. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: FindBatman
resource.object: Unable to find batman.exe system program.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: confirmBatchCancel
resource.object: Are you sure you want to cancel this batch?

resource.name: ErrorBatchInProgress
resource.object:
A batch is already in progress on production line.
It needs to be completed before starting this one.

resource.name: NoAvailableProductionLine
resource.object: No available production line for batches

resource.name: DifferentLineProfile
resource.object: Batches do not share the same line profile and cannot be routed together

resource.name: InvalidPoName
resource.object: Purchase order name cannot be empty.

resource.name: InvalidFirstDay
resource.object: First catch day is not valid.

resource.name: InvalidLastDay
resource.object: Last catch day is not valid.

resource.name: InvalidMissingProduct
resource.object: Product is empty for a data row on {0}.

resource.name: InvalidPackagingProduct
resource.object: Product is missing in the packaging list.

resource.name: InvalidPackaging
resource.object: Packaging is missing for one of the products.

resource.name: operatorInputTypeNullError
resource.object: Column 'Operator input type' cannot be empty.

resource.name: ActiveSupplies
resource.object: The process unit has active supplies using this supply method.{0}Deleting this record will cause these supplies to be removed from the process unit supply list.

resource.name: DeleteError
resource.object: Could not delete record. The process unit has supplies using this method that could not be deleted.

resource.name: ServiceError
resource.object: Could not delete record, process unit service is not available. Please contact the system administrator.

resource.name: AmountUmNotSet
resource.object: Amount unit must be set when track amount is set

resource.name: Error.NoLicense
resource.object: Can't get Recipe system module license.

resource.name: btnFilterReset.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to reset the filters to default values.

resource.name: edFilterValidFrom.Hint
resource.object: If set then only recipes with valid date set from this date are included.

resource.name: edFilterValidTo.Hint
resource.object: If set then only recipes with valid date set up to this date are included.

resource.name: edFilterSearch.Hint
resource.object: Enter partial name of a recipe to search for and then click the search button.

resource.name: Delete.Text
resource.object: Do you want to permanently delete the recipe?

resource.name: Clone.Unsaved
resource.object: Please save the recipe before cloning.

resource.name: Refresh.Unsaved
resource.object: Do you wish to save data before refreshing?

resource.name: BomNotSavedMsg
resource.object: There was a problem saving the BOM

resource.name: Error.LoadingData
resource.object: Failed to load explorer grid data.

resource.name: CancelUnfinishedBatches
resource.object: This master recipe has {0} unfinished batches. {1}In order to save this recipe, the batches need to cancelled. {1}Do you wish to cancel them?

resource.name: ValidInfo
resource.object: The optional parameters ValidFrom and ValidTo can be used\nto control the release and withdrawal of a recipe.

resource.name: btnChangeStatus.ToolTip
resource.object: Click to advance to next recipe status.\nYou can not go back.

resource.name: ChangeStatus.Text
resource.object: The following recipes have lower status than {2}:{0}{1}{0}In order to continue the status of the subrecipes has to be changed as well.{0}{0}Do you want to continue and change the statuses?

resource.name: ChangeMasterRecipeStatus.Text
resource.object: Cannot change status to: {1}.{0}{0}Contains the following subrecipes that have been withdrawn: {0}{2}

resource.name: ReleaseLineProfileMsgBoxText
resource.object: The line profile needs to be released to approve the recipe.

resource.name: ApproveMessageBoxText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to approve this recipe?{0}You will not be able to make changes to it after approval.

resource.name: ReleaseMessageBoxText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to release this recipe?{0}The recipe will be available for creating batches.

resource.name: WithdrawMessageBoxText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to withdraw this recipe?{0}The recipe will not be available after being withdrawn.

resource.name: ReviewMessageBoxText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to review this recipe?{0}You will be able to make changes to the recipe, and it will be available for creating batches, but will not be displayed in recipe reports.

resource.name: ProductInfo
resource.object: A recipe can create more than one product.\nAlong with the main product it is possible to\ndefine by products in this table.

resource.name: Error.NoLicense
resource.object: Can't get Recipe system module license.

resource.name: SavePage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save the pages?

resource.name: BomNotSavedMsg
resource.object: There was a problem saving the BOM

resource.name: SavePage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save current data: '{0}' ?

resource.name: ClearDiagram.ErrorClearing
resource.object: Unable to clear because some of the components are read only.

resource.name: ClearDiagram.Text
resource.object: Do you want to clear current recipe and remove all items from it?

resource.name: ClearDiagram.ReadOnly
resource.object: Recipe is in read only state can not be cleared.

resource.name: Refresh.Text
resource.object: Do you wish to continue with refresh and throw away changes?

resource.name: Clone.Unsaved
resource.object: Please save the recipe before cloning.

resource.name: Error.MissingFields
resource.object: All required fields have not be filled out.

resource.name: Error.CantSave
resource.object: You are not able to save released recipes.

resource.name: CancelUnfinishedBatches
resource.object: This master recipe has {0} unfinished batches. {1}In order to save this recipe, the batches need to cancelled. {1}Do you wish to cancel them?

resource.name: InputInUse
resource.object: Input is assigned to step, unable to delete.

resource.name: chkAutoSwitchToExplorer.ToolTip
resource.object: Show the explorer automatically when all \n\rpages in the designer have been closed.

resource.name: chkAutoSaveExplorer.ToolTip
resource.object: Automatically save recipe properties if changed in explorer\n\r before selecting new recipe or open a recipe.

resource.name: chkAutoFilter.ToolTip
resource.object: Automatically call refresh everytime a filter is changed.

resource.name: btnEdInstruction.ToolTip
resource.object: Click this button to edit the instructions text.

resource.name: Oper.NoMatch
resource.object: Selected process units do not match.

resource.name: Oper.StartPending
resource.object: Process activity method is in pending state.

resource.name: Oper.CapabilityWithNoActivities
resource.object: No activities are defined on this capability.

resource.name: Oper.ForwardPending
resource.object: Cannot set activity on this process unit. This process unit only allows activity to be set when forwarded from another process unit.

resource.name: btnOpenRecipe.ToolTip
resource.object: Open the selected recipe in another page.

resource.name: edCreateOneUnit.ToolTip
resource.object: Determines if the step should create one or many units.

resource.name: edAmount.ToolTip
resource.object: The amount what is going to be used of the chosen input product.

resource.name: edUseExistingSupply.ToolTip
resource.object: Determines if the step should use existing supply on the process unit.

resource.name: CanNotDelete
resource.object: Can't delete, some of the components are read only

resource.name: Error.NoStepDescription
resource.object: Instruction text missing from instruction step

resource.name: Error.NoActivityCompleteManual
resource.object: Manual activity completion selected but activity is missing for capability

resource.name: Error.LowerTolerance
resource.object: Lower tolerance value has to be less than upper tolerance value.

resource.name: Error.ToleranceType
resource.object: Can not set tolerance type to NotSet if either tolerance values are set.

resource.name: Error.BatchMinMax
resource.object: Min batch value has to be less than max batch value.

resource.name: Error.InputAllAmountNotUsed
resource.object: '{0}' is using less than the defined amount.

resource.name: Error.InputMoreAmountUsed
resource.object: '{0}' is using more than the defined amount.

resource.name: Error.DecimalPlaces
resource.object: Invalid value for decimal places. Valid range is 0-5.

resource.name: Error.AmountZero
resource.object: Amount produced by batch has to be greater than zero.

resource.name: Error.ReduceBatchSize
resource.object: Cannot reduce size of batch that is in progress.

resource.name: Error.CapabilityNotInLineProfile
resource.object: Capability is not in line profile.

resource.name: NoAvailableSteps
resource.object: There are no available steps in the batch for this device.

resource.name: CanFinishAutomaticWeighingStepsOutsideLimits
resource.object: Allow finish auto. weighing steps outside tolerances

resource.name: DisconnectError
resource.object: No connection to server. Trying to reconnect...

resource.name: StartStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to start step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: OpenStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to open step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: ConfirmCompleteStep
resource.object: Are you sure you want to complete the step?

resource.name: NoRecordedAmount
resource.object: No amount has been recorded. Do you want to complete the step?

resource.name: ForceFinishStep
resource.object: Recipe step requirements not met. Do you want to complete the step anyway?

resource.name: GetBatchFailed
resource.object: Unable to get batch. Please contact a system administrator.

resource.name: DisconnectError
resource.object: Error: No connection to server. Trying to reconnect...

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: RecordingError
resource.object: Unable to record. Please contact system administrator

resource.name: TestBatchRecord
resource.object: Not possible to record into a test batch.

resource.name: AltProductScanned
resource.object: You are using alternative product: {0} ({1}) {2}You need {3} {4} of {0} for the remaining {5} {4} of {6}

resource.name: FindBatman
resource.object: Unable to find batman.exe system program.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: RecordingError
resource.object: Unable to record. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: RecordingError
resource.object: Unable to record. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: SetActivityFailed
resource.object: Unable to set activity. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: StopInspectionFailed
resource.object: Unable to stop inspection. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.object: Unable to stop inspection. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: CompleteStepFailed
resource.object: Unable to complete step. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: ErrorMessage
resource.object: Could not get data. Please contact system administrator.

resource.name: lblQuestion.Text
resource.object: Are you sure you want to withdraw this recipe?

resource.name: FindBatman
resource.object: Unable to find batman.exe system program.

resource.name: DesignButtonHint
resource.object: Click to configure xml of the selected line profile.

resource.name: noValidOrderSelected
resource.object: No valid order selected. Batches can be created for Open Production orders with at least one Product Line with the line type Allows Production.

resource.name: BatchStartFailedError
resource.object: Error: Batch failed to start on production line.

resource.name: ErrorBatchInProgress
resource.object:
A batch is already in progress on production line.
It needs to be completed before starting this one.

resource.name: ErrorStartBatchInProgressExtraProductionText
resource.object: Go to the production tab to complete the batch

resource.name: confirmSetupStart
resource.object: Are you sure you want to start the setup for lot{0}{1} ({2})?

resource.name: ManualProgramSetupText
resource.object: Error occurred in machine connection.{0}Do you want to skip program download{0}and manually set the correct program on the machine?

resource.name: canCreateNewLotQueueLineSetup
resource.object: Lot queue: Create new line setup

resource.name: ConfirmClearMessage
resource.object: Do you want to clear the current production line setup?

resource.name: CancelLineSetupMessage
resource.object: Do you want to cancel the selected production line setup?

resource.name: SavePage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save the pages?

resource.name: ReleaseMessageBoxText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to release this line profile?

resource.name: WithdrawMessageBoxText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to withdraw this line profile?{0}The line profile will not be available after being withdrawn.

resource.name: Error.WithdrawFailed
resource.object: Line profile is being used by a master recipe.{0}In order to withdraw line profile, the master recipe needs to be withdrawn.

resource.name: SavePage.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save current data: '{0}' ?

resource.name: Error.NoLineProfile
resource.object: No line profile data to save.

resource.name: ClearDiagram.ErrorClearing
resource.object: Unable to clear because some of the components are read only.

resource.name: ClearDiagram.Text
resource.object: Do you want to clear current recipe and remove all items from it?

resource.name: ClearDiagram.ReadOnly
resource.object: Line profile is in read only state and can not be cleared.

resource.name: Refresh.Text
resource.object: Do you wish to continue with refresh and throw away changes?

resource.name: Clone.Unsaved
resource.object: Please save the line profile before cloning.

resource.name: Error.MissingFields
resource.object: All required fields have not be filled out.

resource.name: CanNotDelete
resource.object: Can't delete, some of the components are read only

resource.name: Error.DataCollectionStationDuplicate
resource.object: Duplicate data collection stations not allowed.

resource.name: Error.DataCollectionStationMismatch
resource.object: Parallel capabilities must have the same data collection station.

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ThereAreReasonsNotAssignedToAnEntity
resource.object: There are reasons not assigned to an entity, or

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ReasonsAssignedToAnEntityWhereParentAreNot
resource.object: reasons assigned to an entity where the parent reasons are not assigned to that entity

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_UnassignedReasonsWillNotBeSaved
resource.object: unassigned reasons will not be saved

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_ThereAreUnsavedChangesTheseWillBeLost
resource.object: There are unsaved changes, these will be lost.

resource.name: MsgBoxTxt_RefreshingDataFailed
resource.object: Refreshing data failed, see log for details.

resource.name: ToolTipManualEditMode
resource.object: The reason can be applied manual or automatically

resource.name: ToolTipAutomaticEditMode
resource.object: The reason is determined automatically and it can not be used manually

resource.name: ActivityChangeConfirmText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to change activity to '{0}'?

resource.name: noprunit
resource.object: GUI configuration does not include a process unit ID

resource.name: prunitclient
resource.object: Cannot configuration connection to base system

resource.name: OutsideRange
resource.object: Prod. day is outside allowed range.

resource.name: lotCreateQuestion
resource.object: Do you want to create new lot?

resource.name: plotCreateQuestion
resource.object: Do you want to create new production lot?

resource.name: ActivityChangeConfirmText
resource.object: Are you sure you want to change activity to '{0}'?

resource.name: packagingDoesNotAllowCountChange
resource.object: You can not change count for this packaging

resource.name: packCountMustBeSame
resource.object: Pack packaging must be of same amount as previous packaging

resource.name: packagingDoesNotAllowWeightChange
resource.object: You can not change weight for this packaging

resource.name: ChosenPackagingIsNotAllowed
resource.object: Order line does not allow this packaging.

resource.name: CombinedPackagingDoesNotAllowChange
resource.object: Combined packaging does not allow change.
